case_title: MIDLAND CREDIT MANAGEMENT, INC. VS. TRA M THACH ET AL

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION RE: CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE 1033; INTEREST; AND EVIDENCE CODE 1550 (TRANSACTION ID # 210076247) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND CREDIT MANAGEMENT, INC.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MIDLAND CREDIT MANAGEMENT, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT THACH, TRA M $6,451.23 PRINCIPAL, $319.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,770.73, SEE SCANNED DOC
